entryPoint.notes: Fires when user clicks the list item whose section.id === 'upload'; guard `onNavigate &&` prevents crash when prop is absent.

calls.notes: Prop passed from App.jsx; resolves at runtime to App.handleNavigate.
Triggers re-render; updated activeSection prop is passed down to Sidebar, switching the Upload <li> to navItemActiveStyle. No content panel change occurs — DocumentGrid is always rendered.
